race.comment: Tough race with many in-form and lightly raced runners converging. POMPATUS (2) goes on top after he ran on stoutly to be beaten a head over 1500m at Kembla last start. Rock hard fit after two runs back and gets to 1600m at the right time of the prep. OUI FLOURISH (6) returned to form last time out when just half a length from the winner in a Class 1 over 1350m at Wyong. Expect they will go forward out to this trip from an inside gate with blinkers on. Sure to give backers a sight. THE WARRIOR (4) was ridden with more intent last start and battled on bravely but just missed over 1350m at Wyong. Cherry ripe after two runs back - whether he can run a strong 1600m is the query. VARJAK (1) strips fitter second-up and holds genuine claims as well off a solid return at Rosehill.
